title: Migrate billing raw-SQL column access to typed Drizzle

tasks.title: Confirm qzpay-drizzle 1.11.0 in worktree
tasks.description: Sanity check that the worktree's @qazuor/qzpay-drizzle install is 1.11.0 and the 6 target columns are present in packages/db/src/billing/schemas.ts (re-export barrel). No code change expected — just a pre-flight check before Phase A starts.

tasks.title: Add loadSubscriptionDiscountState() shared helper
tasks.description: Add a new typed export to packages/service-core/src/services/billing/subscription/subscription-product-domain.ts: loadSubscriptionDiscountState({ subscriptionId }) returning { id, status, planId, mpSubscriptionId, promoCodeId, promoEffectRemainingCycles } via a typed db.select().from(billingSubscriptions).where(eq(...)).limit(1). This is infrastructure Phase C's 3 call sites (payment-logic.ts, dunning.job.ts, apply-scheduled-plan-changes.ts) and Phase B's promo-code.renewal.ts depend on.

tasks.title: Remove dual camelCase/snake_case read in isAccommodationSubscription
tasks.description: In subscription-product-domain.ts, delete the `record.productDomain ?? record.product_domain` fallback -- keep only `record.productDomain`. Re-run spec-239-entitlement-isolation.test.ts to confirm the camelCase-only path still passes unchanged. Verify all 5 callers (entitlement.ts, addon-entitlement.service.ts x3, addon-user-addons.ts, featured-entitlement.resolver.ts) already pass a typed Drizzle row.

tasks.title: Migrate subscription-checkout.service.ts product_domain UPDATEs
tasks.description: Replace the 2 raw `sql\`UPDATE billing_subscriptions SET product_domain = ...\`` sites (commerce ~line 722, partner ~line 832) with tx.update(billingSubscriptions).set({ productDomain: ... }).where(eq(billingSubscriptions.id, subscription.id)). Keep inside the existing withTransaction block. Verify subscription-checkout.service.test.ts still passes.

tasks.title: Migrate subscription-comp-create.service.ts + update test mocks
tasks.description: Replace the SELECT (~line 81, reads product_domain to gate accommodation-only comp) and UPDATE (~lines 137-139, stamps product_domain + promo_code_id) with typed Drizzle. Update subscription-comp-create.service.test.ts (lines 73-172) which currently asserts on db.execute mock calls -- rewrite those assertions against the new db.select/db.insert typed mock calls, same resulting values. This file was NOT in the original Linear issue list (found during spec research).

subtasks.title: Migrate SELECT gating comp to accommodation-only plans

tasks.title: Migrate listPlans.ts getNonAccommodationPlanSlugs()
tasks.description: Replace `sql\`SELECT name FROM billing_plans WHERE product_domain IS DISTINCT FROM ...\`` with db.select({ name: billingPlans.name }).from(billingPlans).where(ne(billingPlans.productDomain, ProductDomainEnum.ACCOMMODATION)). Safe because productDomain is notNull() with a default -- no NULL is ever possible, so ne() is exactly equivalent to IS DISTINCT FROM here. Verify listPlans.test.ts / listPlans.partner-domain.test.ts / listPlans.cutover.test.ts still pass.

tasks.title: Migrate partners/admin/list-plans.ts + write net-new test
tasks.description: Replace the raw SELECT (product_domain = 'partner' filter + correlated price subquery, ~lines 24-43) with typed Drizzle (eq(billingPlans.productDomain, ProductDomainEnum.PARTNER) plus a typed subquery/join for price). Write list-plans.test.ts (currently does not exist -- zero test coverage found during spec research): cover success response shape, the partner-domain filter excluding non-partner plans, and the price subquery returning the same shape.

subtasks.title: Migrate SELECT + correlated subquery to typed Drizzle

tasks.title: Migrate featured-entitlement.resolver.ts product_domain SELECT
tasks.description: Replace the raw SELECT (~lines 108-120, reads id/plan_id/status/product_domain from billing_subscriptions) with typed Drizzle, keeping the existing isAccommodationSubscription() filter call unchanged (per T-003). Verify featured-entitlement.resolver.test.ts still passes.

tasks.title: Fold product_domain UPDATE into insert in commercePlan.seed.ts + partnerPlan.seed.ts
tasks.description: Both packages/seed/src/required/commercePlan.seed.ts (~line 107) and partnerPlan.seed.ts (~line 84) currently do a raw `sql\`UPDATE billing_plans SET product_domain = ...\`` right after a typed .insert(). Fold product_domain directly into the .insert({...}) values object and delete the follow-up raw UPDATE. Verify with a local `pnpm db:seed:required` run that plans still get the correct product_domain value. Not in the original Linear issue list (found during spec research).

tests.details: No unit tests planned per spec (seed script); typecheck+lint verified. Live pnpm db:seed:required run SKIPPED -- this worktree has no provisioned per-worktree DB yet (wt:up not run), and .env.local still points at a stale worktree_spec_308 DB name from env copy. Flagged to user.

tasks.title: Collapse promo-code.crud.ts column projection + fold persistEffectColumns()
tasks.description: Collapse promoCodeColumnsWithEffect() to a plain getTableColumns(billingPromoCodes) call (drop the manual sql<string|null>`effect_kind` etc. projections). Delete persistEffectColumns() entirely -- fold its 3 branches' (comp / trial_extension / discount) effect-column values directly into the corresponding .insert({...}) calls (confirmed safe: none of the 3 branches reference the row's generated id when computing effect-column values). Verify promo-code.crud.test.ts still passes.

tasks.title: Migrate promo-code.redemption.ts promo_effect_remaining_cycles UPDATE
tasks.description: Replace the raw UPDATE (~lines 918-931, sets promo_effect_remaining_cycles on redemption of a discount effect) with tx.update(billingSubscriptions).set({ promoEffectRemainingCycles: ... }).where(eq(...)). Verify promo-code.redemption.test.ts still passes.

tests.details: 19/19 (promo-code.redemption.test.ts, no assertions on this specific field previously either)

tasks.title: Migrate promo-code.renewal.ts to use shared discount-state helper
tasks.description: resolveRenewalPromoEffect's SELECT (~lines 232-239, reads promo_code_id/promo_effect_remaining_cycles) becomes a call to loadSubscriptionDiscountState() from T-002. persistRemainingCycles()'s UPDATE (~lines 519-525, decrements promo_effect_remaining_cycles) becomes typed .set({...}). Verify promo-code.renewal.test.ts still passes.

tests.details: 11/11 (promo-code.renewal.test.ts, fully rewritten mocks to typed select/update chains)

tasks.title: Migrate promo-code.trial-extension.ts raw-SQL effect-column access
tasks.description: Migrate this file's raw-SQL touch point on the effect columns to typed Drizzle -- update the stale 'added via extras/018' comment at ~line 124. NOTE: exact line range was not pinned during spec research (flagged as an open item in the spec's Internal Review Notes) -- re-confirm the precise site at implementation start before editing. Verify promo-code.trial-extension.test.ts still passes.

tasks.title: Migrate promo-discount-apply.service.ts SELECT + UPDATE
tasks.description: Replace the SELECT (~lines 116-122, loads id/customer_id/status/plan_id/mp_subscription_id) and the promo_effect_remaining_cycles UPDATE (~lines 242-246, the B1 fix correcting the reducer's N-1 seed) with typed Drizzle. Verify promo-discount-apply.service.test.ts still passes with the same corrected value.

tests.details: 736/736 full test/billing/ sweep -- also fixed forward regressions in promo-code.effect-engine.test.ts and promo-code.migration.test.ts left over from T-011/T-012 (missed on first pass, caught by broader sweep)

tasks.title: Migrate subscription-discount-signup.service.ts UPDATE
tasks.description: Replace the raw UPDATE (~lines 152-157, stamps promo_code_id + seeds promo_effect_remaining_cycles at signup-time discount application) with typed .set({...}). Verify subscription-discount-signup.service.test.ts still passes.

tasks.title: Fold effect-columns UPDATE into insert in billingPromoCodes.seed.ts
tasks.description: billingPromoCodes.seed.ts (~lines 86-99) currently does a raw UPDATE for effect_kind/value_kind/duration_cycles/extra_days right after insert. Fold these directly into the .insert({...}) values object and delete the follow-up raw UPDATE. Verify with a local `pnpm db:seed:required` run. Not in the original Linear issue list (found during spec research).

tasks.title: Fix stale extras/018 comment in promo-code.schema.ts
tasks.description: Update the stale 'added via extras/018' JSDoc comment at packages/schemas/src/api/billing/promo-code.schema.ts:291 to reflect that these are now typed Drizzle columns (qzpay-drizzle 1.11.0, HOS-73).

tasks.title: Migrate payment-logic.ts to use shared discount-state helper
tasks.description: resolveDiscountAwareUpgradeAmount's SELECT (~lines 353-360) becomes a call to loadSubscriptionDiscountState() from T-002. Verify payment-logic.test.ts and payment-logic.cutover.test.ts still pass.

tasks.title: Migrate dunning.job.ts to use shared discount-state helper
tasks.description: isCompOrActivelyDiscounted's SELECT (~lines 66-72) becomes a call to loadSubscriptionDiscountState() from T-002. Verify dunning.job.test.ts still passes.

tasks.title: Migrate apply-scheduled-plan-changes.ts to use shared discount-state helper
tasks.description: resolveDiscountAwarePlanChangeAmount's SELECT (~lines 94-100) becomes a call to loadSubscriptionDiscountState() from T-002. Verify apply-scheduled-plan-changes.test.ts still passes.

tasks.title: Migrate subscription-poll.job.ts bulk discount-amounts reconciliation
tasks.description: reconcileActiveDiscountAmounts's bulk SELECT (~lines 463-470, loads id/plan_id/mp_subscription_id/promo_code_id/promo_effect_remaining_cycles for ALL active discounted subs) becomes its own typed db.select({...}).from(billingSubscriptions).where(and(...)) -- this is a bulk query, not a single-row lookup, so it does NOT use the loadSubscriptionDiscountState() helper from T-002. Verify subscription-poll.job.test.ts still passes.

tasks.title: Migrate subscription-promo-effect.ts admin diagnostic JOIN
tasks.description: Replace the raw JOIN SELECT (~lines 90-101, joins billing_subscriptions<->billing_promo_codes selecting promo_effect_remaining_cycles/effect_kind/value_kind/duration_cycles/extra_days) with typed db.select({...}).from(billingSubscriptions).innerJoin(billingPromoCodes, ...). Update the stale extras/018-019 JSDoc tags at ~lines 36-48. Verify subscription-promo-effect.test.ts still passes.

tasks.title: Update root CLAUDE.md extras-carril references
tasks.description: Root CLAUDE.md (~lines 183-192) states product_domain ships via extras/017-billing-plans-product-domain.column.sql (deleted in hospeda PR #2031) and describes effect_kind/promo_effect_remaining_cycles as extras 018/019. Correct to describe all 6 columns as typed Drizzle columns from @qazuor/qzpay-drizzle 1.11.0 (HOS-73).

tasks.title: Update docs/guides/migrations.md extras-carril worked example
tasks.description: docs/guides/migrations.md (~lines 224-241) has a whole worked-example section 'Extras-carril example: product_domain columns (SPEC-239)' citing the deleted extras/017 file and stating these columns 'cannot be expressed in the Hospeda Drizzle TS schema' -- no longer true. Rewrite or remove the section.

tasks.title: Update ADR-035 extras-carril tradeoff note
tasks.description: docs/decisions/ADR-035-commerce-core-gastronomy-separation.md (~lines 77-81, 191-193) cites the deleted extras/017 file and lists as a stated tradeoff that product_domain is 'invisible to the Drizzle TS schema' -- now resolved. Update or mark historical.

tasks.title: Fix packages/service-core/CLAUDE.md wrong migration filename + stale caveat
tasks.description: packages/service-core/CLAUDE.md cites a nonexistent migration file (0042_last_patriot.sql) -- the real file is packages/db/src/migrations/0044_adorable_longshot.sql. Also note that this spec (HOS-75) closed the 'raw SQL still pending' gap the doc previously flagged.

tasks.title: Annotate stale product_domain reference in .specs/HOS-20/spec.md
tasks.description: .specs/HOS-20-iva-tax-handling/spec.md:110 cites product_domain as added '(extras/016)'/'(extras/017)' -- now stale since HOS-73/HOS-75. Add a correcting note or update the reference table.

tasks.title: Final scoped verification across all 3 phases
tasks.description: Run pnpm --filter @repo/service-core typecheck, pnpm --filter @repo/api typecheck, scoped pnpm test runs per domain (service-core promo-code/product-domain tests, api billing/webhooks/cron tests -- never the full suite at once), and pnpm lint/check for noExplicitAny/unused-import cleanup as manual row interfaces are deleted. This is the final gate before closing HOS-75.
